recommendations.title: 12 Strong
recommendations.overview: A team of special forces head into Afghanistan in the aftermath of the September 11th attacks in an attempt to dismantle the Taliban.

recommendations.title: Lebanon
recommendations.overview: During the First Lebanon War in 1982, a lone tank and a paratroopers platoon are dispatched to search a hostile town.

recommendations.title: The Breadwinner
recommendations.overview: A headstrong young girl in Afghanistan, ruled by the Taliban, disguises herself as a boy in order to provide for her family.

recommendations.title: Wonder Woman
recommendations.overview: An Amazon princess comes to the world of Man in the grips of the First World War to confront the forces of evil and bring an end to human conflict.

recommendations.title: Les Misérables
recommendations.overview: In 19th century France, Jean Valjean, a man imprisoned for stealing bread, must flee a relentless policeman named Javert. The pursuit consumes both men's lives, and soon Valjean finds himself in the midst of the student revolutions in France.

recommendations.title: Warhorse One
recommendations.overview: A gunned down Navy SEAL Master Chief must guide a child to safety through a gauntlet of hostile Taliban insurgents and survive the brutal Afghanistan wilderness.

recommendations.title: The Outpost
recommendations.overview: A small unit of U.S. soldiers, alone at the remote Combat Outpost Keating, located deep in the valley of three mountains in Afghanistan, battles to defend against an overwhelming force of Taliban fighters in a coordinated attack. The Battle of Kamdes

recommendations.title: Jarhead 2: Field of Fire
recommendations.overview: Battle-scarred and disillusioned by the war, Corporal Chris Merrimette is put in charge of a unit whose next mission is to resupply a remote outpost on the edge of Taliban-controlled territory. While driving through the hostile Helmand province, a Na

recommendations.title: Lone Survivor
recommendations.overview: Four Navy SEALs on a covert mission to neutralize a high-level Taliban operative must make an impossible moral decision in the mountains of Afghanistan that leads them into an enemy ambush. As they confront unthinkable odds, the SEALs must find reser

recommendations.title: Carjacked
recommendations.overview: A single mom and her child are carjacked by a bank robber who has no intention of letting them go.
